The '''Leocald Opera House''' was a large, multi-storied [[Opera/Legends|opera]] house located within the [[Historical District]] of [[Estalle]], an [[Estalle Island|island]] [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. The building was named after a former [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], [[Leocald VII]], who was considered the patron saint of Tapani opera. Performers working in the building had access to three theatres, a large number of rehearsal halls, a dance academy and apartments for those in residence. During peak time in [[Capital Season]], the House would often have two to three different shows running at the same time, with less on during the rest of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="LotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Opera House was first mentioned in the campaign guide included in ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'', a [[1997]] supplement written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Chris Doyle]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].
